mirrored_supporting_tool_limitations.daemon_scope: Daemon boundary must not collapse to the UI page only when no-nodeId get_metadata under-reports the Figma file page list.

boundary_policy.summary: Figma is product/design evidence. This daemon manifest records only the daemon-side execution boundary consumed from the contracts/control-plane SSOTs.
boundary_policy.top_down: When Figma changes saved data, generated API, or assignment semantics, update contracts/control-plane first. Daemon changes only after the upstream fact becomes an assignment, lifecycle command, liveness field, or provider-runtime input.
boundary_policy.bottom_up: When daemon runtime evidence finds a lifecycle, provider, batching, or detection limitation, record the daemon fact here first and escalate upstream only if client-facing semantics must change.

entries.name: 컴포넌트 참여자 드롭다운
entries.daemon_scope: Consumes the accepted SaaS assignment after task/subtask target validation. It does not sort dropdown rows or decide participant UI sections.
daemon_consumed_facts: task assignment command accepted by SaaS

entries.name: 댓글 소통
entries.daemon_scope: Reports provider progress batches with thread identity and consumes stop/cancel commands polled from SaaS. It does not create rendered comments or keep client streams open.

entries.name: 추가 기획 내용
entries.daemon_scope: Accepts only already-authorized task/subtask assignments. It does not extend assignment to project, milestone, intake, AI property filler, or mention surfaces.
client_owned_facts: which non-target surfaces hide or disable agent UI

entries.name: 메뉴바
entries.daemon_scope: No executable daemon behavior. Menu navigation can open a screen that later reads SaaS/device data, but the daemon does not own route labels or availability.

entries.name: 런타임 설정페이지
entries.daemon_scope: Owns local current-device lifecycle facts and executes accepted agent-bound lifecycle commands. SaaS owns the remote read model projected to the client.

entries.name: 에이전트 설정페이지
entries.daemon_scope: Consumes the assigned runtime, selected model, and instruction snapshot during provider execution. It does not create, update, delete, timestamp, or validate saved agent records.

entries.name: 에이전트 추가
entries.daemon_scope: No direct daemon mutation. The daemon only sees the resulting assignment/runtime values if the created agent is later assigned.
daemon_consumed_facts: created agent runtime/model/instruction only after assignment

entries.name: 에이전트 목록
entries.daemon_scope: No list rendering ownership. The daemon may contribute liveness evidence that SaaS projects, but it does not order, filter, or style agent rows.

entries.name: Wireframe - 온보딩
entries.daemon_scope: Supplies runtime detection/liveness to onboarding screens and later consumes the assigned instruction/runtime/model. It does not own onboarding sequence or workspace selection.

entries.name: 돌아가는 AI 보여주기
entries.daemon_scope: Owns provider binary detection and liveness evidence. It does not own the detected/not-detected labels, radio state, or row dimming.

entries.name: 에이전트 선택
entries.daemon_scope: No fixture catalog ownership. Fixture selection creates a normal agent upstream; daemon only consumes that agent after assignment.
daemon_consumed_facts: assigned instruction/runtime/model after fixture-created agent is assigned

entries.name: Frame 6350445
entries.daemon_scope: No direct-setting form ownership. The daemon consumes only the final instruction/runtime/model snapshot after SaaS authorization.

entries.name: Frame 6350447
entries.daemon_scope: No workspace selection ownership. Workspace-scoped agent creation happens upstream before daemon execution.
daemon_consumed_facts: workspace-scoped assignment only after SaaS accepts it

entries.name: 돌아가는 AI 보여주기
entries.daemon_scope: Reports no selectable runtime when providers are absent/offline. It does not install providers or start a provider installation flow.

entries.name: 데스크탑앱 온보딩-런타임 감지 X
entries.daemon_scope: Supplies negative detection/liveness evidence only. It does not bundle, download, install, or update Claude/Codex/OpenClaw/Cursor.

entries.name: 웹 온보딩
entries.daemon_scope: No web onboarding command ownership. The macOS app download can eventually launch a daemon artifact, but sign-up, terms, invites, and waitlist stay product/client facts.

entries.name: 런타임 설정페이지 엠티
entries.daemon_scope: Contributes local liveness/detection facts when running. Empty-state install cards, Windows waitlist, and marketing consent are outside daemon execution.
